kept.text:
Watch @Jacob_Rees_Mogg’s farewell to hereditary peers. 

To see the Earl of Devon and the Duke of Wellington on the list of peers so unceremoniously thrown away breaks my heart. For any of you who have seen the film Kingdom of Heaven and are familiar with Queen Sibylla of Jerusalem - the historic Queen’s mother, Agnes, was of the same house as the current Earl of Devon. It is an Earldom that has roots in the Ealdorman of Devon, before the Norman Conquest. What miserable country gives up on a thousand years of history like that? 

https://t.co/pn2VhwKQOa
